item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p07","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer immediately refuses the requested new transfer channel, recognizes the repeated pattern of prior downstream splits via queue/template/supervisor entry, reframes the issue upstream as routing rules, ownership, intake completeness, compensation authority, and escalation responsibility, and proposes consolidation/structural redesign instead. It does not provide the requested channel, queue, entry point, field, checklist, or implementation step."}
